case_title: MARGARET GALVIN VS. GREEN DEPOT BUILDING SUPPLIES OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALVIN, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN DEPOT BUILDING SUPPLIES OF CALIFORNIA, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALVIN, MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN DEPOT BUILDING SUPPLIES OF CALIFORNIA, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $2,411.48 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,636.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
